SELECT DISTINCT ?s ?p FROM <http://example.com/DAV/test> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } ORDER BY ?s;
SELECT ?s (COUNT(?o) AS ?count) FROM <http://example.com/DAV/test> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } GROUP BY ?s;
SELECT ?s ?o FROM <http://example.com/DAV/test> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } UNION SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/title> ?o };
SELECT ?s FROM <http://example.com/DAV/test> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } INTERSECT SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/title> ?o };
WITH { SELECT ?s ?o FROM <http://example.com/DAV/test> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } } INSERT { GRAPH <http://example.com/DAV/test> { ?s <http://example.com/property#new> ?o . } } WHERE { };
